note: First-pass thresholds/weights for the LeanSide-derived Long/Short signal (PLANNING §5, ORCHESTRATION §9). Config-driven so tuning never requires code edits (CLAUDE.md conventions). Consumed by pipeline/compute/ starting Phase 4.

directional_inputs.label: DXY
directional_inputs.note: rising DXY = -1 for India (capital outflow pressure); falling = +1

directional_inputs.label: FII net (prev day)
directional_inputs.note: net buy >= 500cr -> +1, net sell <= -500cr -> -1, else 0 (materiality floor to ignore noise near zero)

directional_inputs.label: Prev close in day range
directional_inputs.note: top third of prior day's own range -> +1, bottom third -> -1, middle third -> 0

conviction_dampeners.label: India VIX
conviction_dampeners.note: elevated (level >= 18) applies mild conviction reduction; spike (level >= 22 OR day-over-day change >= +15%) applies strong conviction reduction. Never votes on direction.

context_only.label: Brent crude
context_only.note: no directional vote, ever; flagged as a context note only when |Δ%| >= threshold

degradation_ladder.one_or_more_missing: each missing directional input votes 0, value rendered '—' / unavailable, data_quality='partial'
degradation_ladder.vix_missing: conviction damping skipped, noted, no direction vote either way

label_bands.note: Conservative public bands (decided 2026-07-12): same vote mechanics as the private LeanSide engine, but a higher |bias_score| is required before a confident label is shown publicly. bias_label stored in frontmatter is one of Long/Short/Neutral/Cautious (PLANNING §4a, exactly 4 values); 'Mildly'/'Strongly' intensity below is a DISPLAY-ONLY computation from bias_score at render time, not a separate stored enum. 'Cautious' is reserved for near-neutral score (-1..+1) occurring simultaneously with active VIX conviction damping — flagging this reconciliation for confirmation before Phase 4 locks the compute layer (see plan notes).
